name: Mexican Rice 2
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Chopped green peppers, cut into strips (1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sour cream, chili sauce, and salt.
2. In a 13 x 9-inch baking pan, layer 1 cup cooked rice, 1/2 of the sour cream-chili mixture, and 1/2 of the cheese strips.
3. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
4. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees F.) for 25 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and top with meatballs and sauce.
6. Continue baking for 5 minutes or until cheese melts.
